title: Stripe checkout + webhook for Agent Auth API
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/v1/auth/checkout: creates Stripe Checkout Session for Pro ($29) or Scale ($99)
POST /api/v1/auth/webhooks/stripe: handles checkout.session.completed, subscription.updated, subscription.deleted, invoice.payment_failed
checkout.session.completed: creates account (if not exists), sets tier, sends account API key via email
